author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

FIRST-EVER COMMUNITY-CREATED DAO PROPOSAL IS LIVE!

Star Atlas history has been made! The first-ever community-created proposal is now live on our DAO page. It’s time to put your POLIS and POLIS Voting Power to work! 

 This proposal requests funding from the Star Atlas DAO's ecosystem fund to support the first official Community Meetup at Gamescom 2025 in Cologne, Germany. 

 | Vote now: https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/62506041-933e-4b3e-a450-a2596c15a801
 | Discuss here: ⁠unknown

4:13pm PT edit: We’re aware of the voting error and have reported it to the team. We’ll update this announcement as soon as it’s resolved. Thanks for your patience!
